name_cn:
Premium quality, high version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from apricot calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching and a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a slim leather strap closure for secure storage, along with a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp. The adjustable sides enhance its elegance. The top leather handle is paired with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm
